description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono Docker image with two stages: pluginbase and core. Add a pluginbase job in the pluginbase stage that runs: cd RTSharpPlugin, nuget install packages.config, xbuild /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=\"AnyCPU\" RTSharpPlugin.csproj, and publishes the built DLL at RTSharpPlugin/bin/Debug/RTSharpPlugin.dll as an artifact. Add a core job in the core stage that runs: cd RTSharpPlugin, nuget install packages.config, cd ../RTSharp, nuget install packages.config, xbuild /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=\"AnyCPU\" RTSharp.csproj, and publishes the Debug output at RTSharp/bin/Debug as an artifact. No caches, services, or special rules are defined.
